title: Lurnea Kitchen Renovation
summary: Kitchen renovation in Lurnea with an updated island layout, stronger storage and cleaner joinery lines.
heroAlt: Lurnea kitchen renovation with dark lower cabinetry and island bench
overview: This Lurnea kitchen renovation centred on improving the working layout of the room through new joinery, an island bench and a sharper cabinet composition. The changes were aimed at making the kitchen feel more organised and better balanced for daily use.
materials: Practical layout improvements for day-to-day use

afterImages.alt: Lurnea kitchen renovation with island bench
afterImages.caption: Completed Lurnea kitchen renovation with an island bench, dark lower cabinetry and lighter upper finishes.

afterImages.alt: Lurnea kitchen working triangle and cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Another kitchen angle showing the cabinetry layout and appliance positioning in Lurnea.

afterImages.alt: Lurnea kitchen island and appliance wall
afterImages.caption: Island and appliance-wall detail from the finished Lurnea kitchen.
View into the Lurnea kitchen showing how the new joinery opens to the adjacent room.
Completed kitchen detail used for the before-and-after comparison in Lurnea.

beforeImages.caption: Original Lurnea kitchen before the new island, cabinetry and darker colour palette were installed.

beforeImages.alt: Lurnea kitchen before renovation showing original layout
beforeImages.caption: The original Lurnea kitchen layout before the renovation, showing the existing cabinetry and appliance positions.

beforeImages.alt: Lurnea kitchen before renovation from opposite angle
beforeImages.caption: Another view of the original Lurnea kitchen before the new joinery and island were installed.

spaces.title: Kitchen
spaces.text: An updated kitchen layout with island joinery and cleaner cabinetry lines suited to a family-home footprint.

outcome: The finished room feels more settled and functional, with the island and cabinetry helping the kitchen work harder without looking overcrowded.
ctaText: If you are planning a kitchen renovation in Lurnea or nearby, send through your photos or layout and we can help with the next step.
